'''hadhobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalar|scalar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalar|scalar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hadhobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hædhebeth|hædhebeth]] || [[word:hædhebej|hædhebej]] || [[word:hædhebesh|hædhebesh]] || [[word:hædhebe|hædhebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadhodhoboth|hadhodhoboth]] || [[word:hadhodhoboj|hadhodhoboj]] || [[word:hadhodhobosh|hadhodhobosh]] || [[word:hadhodhobo|hadhodhobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadhoboth|hadhoboth]] || [[word:hadhoboj|hadhoboj]] || [[word:hadhobosh|hadhobosh]] || [[word:hadhobo|hadhobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadhofboth|hadhofboth]] || [[word:hadhofboj|hadhofboj]] || [[word:hadhofbosh|hadhofbosh]] || [[word:hadhofbof|hadhofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hadhobotho|hadhobotho]] || [[word:hadhobojo|hadhobojo]] || [[word:hadhobosho|hadhobosho]] || [[word:hadhoboko|hadhoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hadhoboth|hadhoboth]] || [[word:hadhoboj|hadhoboj]] || [[word:hadhobosh|hadhobosh]] || [[word:hadhobo|hadhobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hadhobothol|hadhobothol]] || [[word:hadhobojol|hadhobojol]] || [[word:hadhoboshol|hadhoboshol]] || [[word:hadhobokol|hadhobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hadhobothotho|hadhobothotho]] || [[word:hadhobojojo|hadhobojojo]] || [[word:hadhoboshosho|hadhoboshosho]] || [[word:hadhoboko|hadhoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hadhobothon|hadhobothon]] || [[word:hadhobojon|hadhobojon]] || [[word:hadhoboshon|hadhoboshon]] || [[word:hadhobokon|hadhobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hadhobothoro|hadhobothoro]] || [[word:hadhobojoro|hadhobojoro]] || [[word:hadhoboshoro|hadhoboshoro]] || [[word:hadhobokoro|hadhobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
